title: Nemesis Now Defend the Hoard (Set of 4) 10cm, Resin, Silver, Dragon Figure, Silver Dragon Ornament, Collectable Dragon Giftware, Cast in the Finest Resin, Expertly Hand-Painted
features: Brilliantly Colored Dragons: Four distinct dragons shimmering in red, blue, purple, and green, each standing proudly atop a regal gold and black plinth.
Unique Details: Each dragon clings to a relic, showcasing a broadsword, crested shield, hook, and round shield.
Fantastic Creature Display: Meticulously crafted from high-quality materials, capturing the essence of fantastic creatures.
Explore the Extraordinary: Ideal for enthusiasts in search of mythical wonders, inviting customers to explore the extraordinary.
Magical Setting: Adds a touch of magic to any setting, appealing to those captivated by the mysteries of the fantastical realm.
description: From the manufacturer Dragon Collections From the Indian drought serpent Vritra to the protective welsh Y Ddraig Goch, from the destructive Hittite Illuyanka to the benevolent Korean Mireu, dragons have captured the imaginations of people worldwide since recorded history began. With the resurgence in recent years of the fantasy genre in popular culture, there has been a renewed interest in dragon models. Dragon Pool Backflow Incense Burner Curled over the top of a rock formation, this dragon stares inquisitively. A small metal tray is hidden at the top of the dragons back where a small incense cone cane can be placed. Cast in high-quality resin before being carefully hand-painted, this piece is perfect for holding one of our backflow incense cones. Butterfly Buddy A green dragon stands on the ground, looking lovingly at the pink butterfly resting on its hand and tickling its nose. Cast in the finest resin before being expertly hand-painted, this fantastical figurine would make the perfect addition to any dragon enthusiast's collection. Dracus Machina Standing on all fours, this dragon is seemingly made out of shining, sturdy plates of steel. Bronze machinery extends over the body, cogs and gears exposed, while scales on the legs and tail hint at a biological component. The iron wings are held together with red rivets, and the face is covered with brass cybernetic enhancements.

specifications_table.Care instructions: ‎Wipe clean with a soft, dry cloth. Avoid using water or cleaning products.
